overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a cowboy character walking through a snowy mountain wilderness at night. The character traverses snow-covered terrain under bright moonlight, moving from an open meadow toward a mountain peak, then navigating through a narrow valley with steep rocky slopes before emerging into a wider snow field.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward a distant mountain peak illuminated by moonlight

entered.detail: bright full moon hanging low in the night sky behind the mountain peak
snow-covered rocky mountain summit silhouetted against the moon
dense cluster of snow-laden evergreen trees lining the left side of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain meadow at night. The cowboy character walks forward through deep snow toward a prominent mountain peak silhouetted against a bright full moon. Snow-covered pine trees line the edges of the meadow, and the moon casts long blue shadows across the pristine white landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain valley with steep rocky walls

events.description: moon becomes obscured by mountain terrain, reducing direct illumination and creating darker shadows
path curves gently left as character navigates along the base of the steep mountain slope

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the narrow valley, hugging the left side as the terrain steepens on the right

entered.detail: steep snow-dusted rock wall rising sharply on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower mountain valley where the moon becomes obscured by terrain, dimming the lighting. A steep rocky cliff face rises prominently on the right while the path curves left. The snow-covered pine trees that were distant are now closer on the left, and the mountain peak shifts to the left side of the frame as the character navigates the winding valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow plain with scattered pine trees

events.description: exiting narrow valley into a wider, more open snow field with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the open snow field, heading toward distant tree lines on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow valley into a wide-open snow plain. The steep rocky cliff face recedes behind as the terrain opens up, revealing scattered pine trees across the landscape. The sky remains overcast with diffused light, and the character continues walking through the expansive, pristine snow field toward distant tree lines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit mountain wilderness that shifts from an open, luminous meadow into a dim, enclosed valley. It begins with the cowboy character walking through deep snow across a wide expanse, heading toward a prominent peak silhouetted against a bright full moon. As the character advances, the open landscape narrows and the moon becomes obscured by the terrain, causing the bright blue shadows to fade into dimmer lighting. The scene then shifts as the path curves left, bringing the snow-covered pine trees closer and introducing a steep rocky cliff face that rises prominently on the right. Finally, the camera tracks the character as the mountain peak drifts to the left side of the frame while navigating the winding valley.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from a confined mountain passage into a vast, open wilderness. It begins with the character emerging from a narrow valley, where the steep rocky cliff faces gradually recede into the background. As the terrain opens up, the claustrophobic walls give way to an expansive, pristine snow plain dotted with scattered pine trees. The scene then expands further under an overcast sky with diffused light, following the character as they trek across the wide field toward distant tree lines.
